flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Stonehill College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.8k → $57.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Stonehill College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.8k → $57.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Stonehill College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (80.5% → 70.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Stonehill College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (84.6% → 76.0%).
